body:
If you need **emergency garage door repair in Pleasanton, CA** , these are well-reviewed options that offer emergency or extended-hour service:

  * The Door Doctor — 24/7 service, 4.6★ (287 reviews). Located at 39 California Ave, Suite 102, Pleasanton. Phone: **(925) 484-4290**. [HOME | The Door Doctor](https://www.thedoordoctors.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

  * Valiant Garage Door — 24/7 emergency repair in Pleasanton, 4.6★. Phone: **(925) 409-4974**. [Valiant Garage Door | Emergency Repair & Openers](https://www.valiantdoor.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

  * Precision Garage Door Service — Open daily from 5:00 AM–11:00 PM, 4.9★. Located in Pleasanton.

  * Boulevard Garage Doors, LLC — Nearby in Dublin, open 24/7, 5.0★ (576 reviews).

If your garage door is **stuck open, off its track, or has a broken spring** , avoid forcing it closed or operating the opener, as that can cause additional damage or create a safety hazard. Most emergency repair companies can dispatch a technician the same day, and some advertise response times of around an hour depending on availability. [Garage Door Repair in Pleasanton | Lions Garage Door Repair Pleasanton](https://pleasantongaragedoorrepair.org/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)[Valiant Garage Door | Emergency Repair & Openers](https://www.valiantdoor.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)
